revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Citation/styles.css"/><cite class="citation book csvan"{{
  #if: {{{ref|{{{harvid|}}}}}}
  | <nowiki/> id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref|CITEREF{{{harvid}}}}}}}}"
}}>{{
  #if: {{{author|}}} | {{{author}}}{{{author.|.}}} 
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	  | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
	       {{{chapter|}}} {{
		 #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	       }}
	     }}]
	  | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	    }}
	}}{{
	  #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	  |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	  | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	}} 
    }}In: {{#ifeq: {{{editor}}} | - || {{{editor}}}.  }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{trans_title|}}}
  | ''{{
      #if: {{{url|}}}
      | [{{{url}}} {{#if:||
	   {{{title|}}} {{
	     #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	   }}
	 }}]
      | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | <nowiki/>{{{title}}}<nowiki/> }} {{
	  #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	}}
    }}''
}}{{
  #if: {{{contenttype|}}}{{{format|}}}
  |  [{{{contenttype|}}}{{
      #if: {{{contenttype|}}} | {{#if: {{{format|}}} |  on  }}
    }}{{{format|}}}].
  | {{#if: {{{trans_title|}}}
      | .
      | {{#if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}} | {{{title.|.}}} }}
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{editionphrase|{{{edition|}}}}}}
  |  {{{editionphrase|{{{edition}}} ed}}}{{{editionphrase.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{secondaryauthor|}}} |  {{{secondaryauthor}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumephrase|{{{volume|}}}}}}
  |  {{{volumephrase|Vol. {{{volume}}}}}}{{
      #if: {{{volumetitle|}}}{{{volumepagination|}}} | , | .
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumetitle|}}} |  {{{volumetitle}}}{{{volumetitle.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumepagination|}}} |  {{{volumepagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{location|}}} |  {{{location}}}:
}}{{
  #if: {{{publisher|}}} |  {{{publisher}}};
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}} |  {{{date|{{{year}}}}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{update|}}}{{
      #if: {{{accessdate|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{update|}}} | <nowiki/>;  }}Retrieved {{{accessdate}}}
    }}]
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}}{{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}} | .
}}{{
  #if: {{{pagination|}}} |  {{{pagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{physicaldescription|}}} |  {{{physicaldescription}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{series|}}}
  |  ({{
      #if: {{{serieseditor|}}} | {{{serieseditor|}}}. 
    }}{{{series}}}{{
      #if: {{{seriesvolumephrase|{{{seriesvolume|}}}}}}
      | <nowiki/>; {{{seriesvolumephrase|vol. {{{seriesvolume}}}}}}
    }}).
}}{{
  #if: {{{language|}}} |  {{{language}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{doi|}}}
  |  {{
      #if: {{{doi-broken-date|}}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}} (inactive {{{doi-broken-date}}}) {{
	  #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}}
	  | [[Category:Pages with DOIs broken vcite]]
	}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}}
    }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{id|}}} |  {{{id}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{isbn|}}} |  {{ISBN|{{{isbn}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{oclc|}}} |  {{OCLC|{{{oclc}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}"
}}{{
  #if: {{{lay-summary|}}}
  |  [{{{lay-summary}}} Lay summary]{{
      #if: {{{lay-source|}}} | <nowiki/>: ''<nowiki/>{{{lay-source}}}<nowiki/>''
     }}{{#if: {{{lay-date|}}} | , {{{lay-date}}} }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{notes|}}} |  {{{notes}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterid|}}} |  {{{chapterid}}},
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  || {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
       |  {{
	   #if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	   | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
		{{{chapter|}}} {{
		  #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
		}}
	      }}]
	   | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	     }}
	 }}{{
	   #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	   |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	   | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	 }}
     }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}}{{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{chapterupdate|}}}{{
      #if: {{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
      | {{
	  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}} | <nowiki/>; 
	}}Retrieved {{{chapteraccessdate}}}
    }}].
}}{{
  #if: {{{at|{{{page|{{{pages|}}}}}}}}}
  |  {{{at|p. {{{page|{{{pages}}}}}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterlanguage|}}} |  {{{chapterlanguage}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Vcite journal/doc}}
</noinclude>

<templatestyles src="Citation/styles.css"/><cite class="citation book csvan"{{
  #if: {{{ref|{{{harvid|}}}}}}
  | <nowiki/> id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref|CITEREF{{{harvid}}}}}}}}"
}}>{{
  #if: {{{author|}}} | {{{author}}}{{{author.|.}}} 
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	  | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
	       {{{chapter|}}} {{
		 #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	       }}
	     }}]
	  | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	    }}
	}}{{
	  #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	  |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	  | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	}} 
    }}In: {{#ifeq: {{{editor}}} | - || {{{editor}}}.  }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{trans_title|}}}
  | ''{{
      #if: {{{url|}}}
      | [{{{url}}} {{#if:||
	   {{{title|}}} {{
	     #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	   }}
	 }}]
      | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | <nowiki/>{{{title}}}<nowiki/> }} {{
	  #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	}}
    }}''
}}{{
  #if: {{{contenttype|}}}{{{format|}}}
  |  [{{{contenttype|}}}{{
      #if: {{{contenttype|}}} | {{#if: {{{format|}}} |  on  }}
    }}{{{format|}}}].
  | {{#if: {{{trans_title|}}}
      | .
      | {{#if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}} | {{{title.|.}}} }}
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{editionphrase|{{{edition|}}}}}}
  |  {{{editionphrase|{{{edition}}} ed}}}{{{editionphrase.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{secondaryauthor|}}} |  {{{secondaryauthor}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumephrase|{{{volume|}}}}}}
  |  {{{volumephrase|Vol. {{{volume}}}}}}{{
      #if: {{{volumetitle|}}}{{{volumepagination|}}} | , | .
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumetitle|}}} |  {{{volumetitle}}}{{{volumetitle.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumepagination|}}} |  {{{volumepagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{location|}}} |  {{{location}}}:
}}{{
  #if: {{{publisher|}}} |  {{{publisher}}};
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}} |  {{{date|{{{year}}}}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{update|}}}{{
      #if: {{{accessdate|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{update|}}} | <nowiki/>;  }}Retrieved {{{accessdate}}}
    }}]
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}}{{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}} | .
}}{{
  #if: {{{pagination|}}} |  {{{pagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{physicaldescription|}}} |  {{{physicaldescription}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{series|}}}
  |  ({{
      #if: {{{serieseditor|}}} | {{{serieseditor|}}}. 
    }}{{{series}}}{{
      #if: {{{seriesvolumephrase|{{{seriesvolume|}}}}}}
      | <nowiki/>; {{{seriesvolumephrase|vol. {{{seriesvolume}}}}}}
    }}).
}}{{
  #if: {{{language|}}} |  {{{language}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{doi|}}}
  |  {{
      #if: {{{doi-broken-date|}}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}} (inactive {{{doi-broken-date}}}) {{
	  #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}}
	  | [[Category:Pages with DOIs broken vcite]]
	}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}}
    }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{id|}}} |  {{{id}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{isbn|}}} |  {{ISBN|{{{isbn}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{oclc|}}} |  {{OCLC|{{{oclc}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}"
}}{{
  #if: {{{lay-summary|}}}
  |  [{{{lay-summary}}} Lay summary]{{
      #if: {{{lay-source|}}} | <nowiki/>: ''<nowiki/>{{{lay-source}}}<nowiki/>''
     }}{{#if: {{{lay-date|}}} | , {{{lay-date}}} }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{notes|}}} |  {{{notes}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterid|}}} |  {{{chapterid}}},
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  || {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
       |  {{
	   #if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	   | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
		{{{chapter|}}} {{
		  #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
		}}
	      }}]
	   | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	     }}
	 }}{{
	   #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	   |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	   | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	 }}
     }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}}{{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{chapterupdate|}}}{{
      #if: {{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
      | {{
	  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}} | <nowiki/>; 
	}}Retrieved {{{chapteraccessdate}}}
    }}].
}}{{
  #if: {{{at|{{{page|{{{pages|}}}}}}}}}
  |  {{{at|p. {{{page|{{{pages}}}}}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterlanguage|}}} |  {{{chapterlanguage}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Vcite journal/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Citation/styles.css"/><cite class="citation book csvan"{{
  #if: {{{ref|{{{harvid|}}}}}}
  | <nowiki/> id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref|CITEREF{{{harvid}}}}}}}}"
}}>{{
  #if: {{{author|}}} | {{{author}}}{{{author.|.}}} 
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	  | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
	       {{{chapter|}}} {{
		 #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	       }}
	     }}]
	  | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	    }}
	}}{{
	  #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	  |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	  | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	}} 
    }}In: {{#ifeq: {{{editor}}} | - || {{{editor}}}.  }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{trans_title|}}}
  | ''{{
      #if: {{{url|}}}
      | [{{{url}}} {{#if:||
	   {{{title|}}} {{
	     #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	   }}
	 }}]
      | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | <nowiki/>{{{title}}}<nowiki/> }} {{
	  #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	}}
    }}''
}}{{
  #if: {{{contenttype|}}}{{{format|}}}
  |  [{{{contenttype|}}}{{
      #if: {{{contenttype|}}} | {{#if: {{{format|}}} |  on  }}
    }}{{{format|}}}].
  | {{#if: {{{trans_title|}}}
      | .
      | {{#if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}} | {{{title.|.}}} }}
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{editionphrase|{{{edition|}}}}}}
  |  {{{editionphrase|{{{edition}}} ed}}}{{{editionphrase.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{secondaryauthor|}}} |  {{{secondaryauthor}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumephrase|{{{volume|}}}}}}
  |  {{{volumephrase|Vol. {{{volume}}}}}}{{
      #if: {{{volumetitle|}}}{{{volumepagination|}}} | , | .
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumetitle|}}} |  {{{volumetitle}}}{{{volumetitle.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumepagination|}}} |  {{{volumepagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{location|}}} |  {{{location}}}:
}}{{
  #if: {{{publisher|}}} |  {{{publisher}}};
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}} |  {{{date|{{{year}}}}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{update|}}}{{
      #if: {{{accessdate|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{update|}}} | <nowiki/>;  }}Retrieved {{{accessdate}}}
    }}]
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}}{{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}} | .
}}{{
  #if: {{{pagination|}}} |  {{{pagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{physicaldescription|}}} |  {{{physicaldescription}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{series|}}}
  |  ({{
      #if: {{{serieseditor|}}} | {{{serieseditor|}}}. 
    }}{{{series}}}{{
      #if: {{{seriesvolumephrase|{{{seriesvolume|}}}}}}
      | <nowiki/>; {{{seriesvolumephrase|vol. {{{seriesvolume}}}}}}
    }}).
}}{{
  #if: {{{language|}}} |  {{{language}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{doi|}}}
  |  {{
      #if: {{{doi-broken-date|}}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}} (inactive {{{doi-broken-date}}}) {{
	  #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}}
	  | [[Category:Pages with DOIs broken vcite]]
	}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}}
    }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{id|}}} |  {{{id}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{isbn|}}} |  {{ISBN|{{{isbn}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{oclc|}}} |  {{OCLC|{{{oclc}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}"
}}{{
  #if: {{{lay-summary|}}}
  |  [{{{lay-summary}}} Lay summary]{{
      #if: {{{lay-source|}}} | <nowiki/>: ''<nowiki/>{{{lay-source}}}<nowiki/>''
     }}{{#if: {{{lay-date|}}} | , {{{lay-date}}} }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{notes|}}} |  {{{notes}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterid|}}} |  {{{chapterid}}},
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  || {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
       |  {{
	   #if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	   | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
		{{{chapter|}}} {{
		  #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
		}}
	      }}]
	   | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	     }}
	 }}{{
	   #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	   |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	   | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	 }}
     }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}}{{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{chapterupdate|}}}{{
      #if: {{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
      | {{
	  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}} | <nowiki/>; 
	}}Retrieved {{{chapteraccessdate}}}
    }}].
}}{{
  #if: {{{at|{{{page|{{{pages|}}}}}}}}}
  |  {{{at|p. {{{page|{{{pages}}}}}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterlanguage|}}} |  {{{chapterlanguage}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Vcite journal/doc}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Citation/styles.css"/><cite class="citation book csvan"{{
  #if: {{{ref|{{{harvid|}}}}}}
  | <nowiki/> id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref|CITEREF{{{harvid}}}}}}}}"
}}>{{
  #if: {{{author|}}} | {{{author}}}{{{author.|.}}} 
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	  | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
	       {{{chapter|}}} {{
		 #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	       }}
	     }}]
	  | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	    }}
	}}{{
	  #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	  |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	  | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	}} 
    }}In: {{#ifeq: {{{editor}}} | - || {{{editor}}}.  }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{trans_title|}}}
  | ''{{
      #if: {{{url|}}}
      | [{{{url}}} {{#if:||
	   {{{title|}}} {{
	     #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	   }}
	 }}]
      | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | <nowiki/>{{{title}}}<nowiki/> }} {{
	  #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	}}
    }}''
}}{{
  #if: {{{contenttype|}}}{{{format|}}}
  |  [{{{contenttype|}}}{{
      #if: {{{contenttype|}}} | {{#if: {{{format|}}} |  on  }}
    }}{{{format|}}}].
  | {{#if: {{{trans_title|}}}
      | .
      | {{#if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}} | {{{title.|.}}} }}
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{editionphrase|{{{edition|}}}}}}
  |  {{{editionphrase|{{{edition}}} ed}}}{{{editionphrase.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{secondaryauthor|}}} |  {{{secondaryauthor}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumephrase|{{{volume|}}}}}}
  |  {{{volumephrase|Vol. {{{volume}}}}}}{{
      #if: {{{volumetitle|}}}{{{volumepagination|}}} | , | .
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumetitle|}}} |  {{{volumetitle}}}{{{volumetitle.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumepagination|}}} |  {{{volumepagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{location|}}} |  {{{location}}}:
}}{{
  #if: {{{publisher|}}} |  {{{publisher}}};
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}} |  {{{date|{{{year}}}}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{update|}}}{{
      #if: {{{accessdate|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{update|}}} | <nowiki/>;  }}Retrieved {{{accessdate}}}
    }}]
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}}{{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}} | .
}}{{
  #if: {{{pagination|}}} |  {{{pagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{physicaldescription|}}} |  {{{physicaldescription}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{series|}}}
  |  ({{
      #if: {{{serieseditor|}}} | {{{serieseditor|}}}. 
    }}{{{series}}}{{
      #if: {{{seriesvolumephrase|{{{seriesvolume|}}}}}}
      | <nowiki/>; {{{seriesvolumephrase|vol. {{{seriesvolume}}}}}}
    }}).
}}{{
  #if: {{{language|}}} |  {{{language}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{doi|}}}
  |  {{
      #if: {{{doi-broken-date|}}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}} (inactive {{{doi-broken-date}}}) {{
	  #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}}
	  | [[Category:Pages with DOIs broken vcite]]
	}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}}
    }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{id|}}} |  {{{id}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{isbn|}}} |  {{ISBN|{{{isbn}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{oclc|}}} |  {{OCLC|{{{oclc}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}"
}}{{
  #if: {{{lay-summary|}}}
  |  [{{{lay-summary}}} Lay summary]{{
      #if: {{{lay-source|}}} | <nowiki/>: ''<nowiki/>{{{lay-source}}}<nowiki/>''
     }}{{#if: {{{lay-date|}}} | , {{{lay-date}}} }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{notes|}}} |  {{{notes}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterid|}}} |  {{{chapterid}}},
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  || {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
       |  {{
	   #if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	   | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
		{{{chapter|}}} {{
		  #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
		}}
	      }}]
	   | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	     }}
	 }}{{
	   #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	   |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	   | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	 }}
     }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}}{{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{chapterupdate|}}}{{
      #if: {{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
      | {{
	  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}} | <nowiki/>; 
	}}Retrieved {{{chapteraccessdate}}}
    }}].
}}{{
  #if: {{{at|{{{page|{{{pages|}}}}}}}}}
  |  {{{at|p. {{{page|{{{pages}}}}}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterlanguage|}}} |  {{{chapterlanguage}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Vcite journal/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Citation/styles.css"/><cite class="citation book csvan"{{
  #if: {{{ref|{{{harvid|}}}}}}
  | <nowiki/> id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref|CITEREF{{{harvid}}}}}}}}"
}}>{{
  #if: {{{author|}}} | {{{author}}}{{{author.|.}}} 
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	  | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
	       {{{chapter|}}} {{
		 #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	       }}
	     }}]
	  | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	    }}
	}}{{
	  #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	  |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	  | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	}} 
    }}In: {{#ifeq: {{{editor}}} | - || {{{editor}}}.  }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{trans_title|}}}
  | ''{{
      #if: {{{url|}}}
      | [{{{url}}} {{#if:||
	   {{{title|}}} {{
	     #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	   }}
	 }}]
      | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | <nowiki/>{{{title}}}<nowiki/> }} {{
	  #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	}}
    }}''
}}{{
  #if: {{{contenttype|}}}{{{format|}}}
  |  [{{{contenttype|}}}{{
      #if: {{{contenttype|}}} | {{#if: {{{format|}}} |  on  }}
    }}{{{format|}}}].
  | {{#if: {{{trans_title|}}}
      | .
      | {{#if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}} | {{{title.|.}}} }}
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{editionphrase|{{{edition|}}}}}}
  |  {{{editionphrase|{{{edition}}} ed}}}{{{editionphrase.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{secondaryauthor|}}} |  {{{secondaryauthor}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumephrase|{{{volume|}}}}}}
  |  {{{volumephrase|Vol. {{{volume}}}}}}{{
      #if: {{{volumetitle|}}}{{{volumepagination|}}} | , | .
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumetitle|}}} |  {{{volumetitle}}}{{{volumetitle.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumepagination|}}} |  {{{volumepagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{location|}}} |  {{{location}}}:
}}{{
  #if: {{{publisher|}}} |  {{{publisher}}};
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}} |  {{{date|{{{year}}}}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{update|}}}{{
      #if: {{{accessdate|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{update|}}} | <nowiki/>;  }}Retrieved {{{accessdate}}}
    }}]
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}}{{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}} | .
}}{{
  #if: {{{pagination|}}} |  {{{pagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{physicaldescription|}}} |  {{{physicaldescription}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{series|}}}
  |  ({{
      #if: {{{serieseditor|}}} | {{{serieseditor|}}}. 
    }}{{{series}}}{{
      #if: {{{seriesvolumephrase|{{{seriesvolume|}}}}}}
      | <nowiki/>; {{{seriesvolumephrase|vol. {{{seriesvolume}}}}}}
    }}).
}}{{
  #if: {{{language|}}} |  {{{language}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{doi|}}}
  |  {{
      #if: {{{doi-broken-date|}}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}} (inactive {{{doi-broken-date}}}) {{
	  #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}}
	  | [[Category:Pages with DOIs broken vcite]]
	}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}}
    }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{id|}}} |  {{{id}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{isbn|}}} |  {{ISBN|{{{isbn}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{oclc|}}} |  {{OCLC|{{{oclc}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}"
}}{{
  #if: {{{lay-summary|}}}
  |  [{{{lay-summary}}} Lay summary]{{
      #if: {{{lay-source|}}} | <nowiki/>: ''<nowiki/>{{{lay-source}}}<nowiki/>''
     }}{{#if: {{{lay-date|}}} | , {{{lay-date}}} }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{notes|}}} |  {{{notes}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterid|}}} |  {{{chapterid}}},
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  || {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
       |  {{
	   #if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	   | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
		{{{chapter|}}} {{
		  #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
		}}
	      }}]
	   | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	     }}
	 }}{{
	   #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	   |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	   | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	 }}
     }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}}{{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{chapterupdate|}}}{{
      #if: {{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
      | {{
	  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}} | <nowiki/>; 
	}}Retrieved {{{chapteraccessdate}}}
    }}].
}}{{
  #if: {{{at|{{{page|{{{pages|}}}}}}}}}
  |  {{{at|p. {{{page|{{{pages}}}}}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterlanguage|}}} |  {{{chapterlanguage}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Vcite journal/doc}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Citation/styles.css"/><cite class="citation book csvan"{{
  #if: {{{ref|{{{harvid|}}}}}}
  | <nowiki/> id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref|CITEREF{{{harvid}}}}}}}}"
}}>{{
  #if: {{{author|}}} | {{{author}}}{{{author.|.}}} 
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	  | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
	       {{{chapter|}}} {{
		 #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	       }}
	     }}]
	  | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	    }}
	}}{{
	  #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	  |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	  | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	}} 
    }}In: {{#ifeq: {{{editor}}} | - || {{{editor}}}.  }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{trans_title|}}}
  | ''{{
      #if: {{{url|}}}
      | [{{{url}}} {{#if:||
	   {{{title|}}} {{
	     #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	   }}
	 }}]
      | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | <nowiki/>{{{title}}}<nowiki/> }} {{
	  #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	}}
    }}''
}}{{
  #if: {{{contenttype|}}}{{{format|}}}
  |  [{{{contenttype|}}}{{
      #if: {{{contenttype|}}} | {{#if: {{{format|}}} |  on  }}
    }}{{{format|}}}].
  | {{#if: {{{trans_title|}}}
      | .
      | {{#if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}} | {{{title.|.}}} }}
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{editionphrase|{{{edition|}}}}}}
  |  {{{editionphrase|{{{edition}}} ed}}}{{{editionphrase.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{secondaryauthor|}}} |  {{{secondaryauthor}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumephrase|{{{volume|}}}}}}
  |  {{{volumephrase|Vol. {{{volume}}}}}}{{
      #if: {{{volumetitle|}}}{{{volumepagination|}}} | , | .
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumetitle|}}} |  {{{volumetitle}}}{{{volumetitle.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumepagination|}}} |  {{{volumepagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{location|}}} |  {{{location}}}:
}}{{
  #if: {{{publisher|}}} |  {{{publisher}}};
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}} |  {{{date|{{{year}}}}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{update|}}}{{
      #if: {{{accessdate|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{update|}}} | <nowiki/>;  }}Retrieved {{{accessdate}}}
    }}]
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}}{{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}} | .
}}{{
  #if: {{{pagination|}}} |  {{{pagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{physicaldescription|}}} |  {{{physicaldescription}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{series|}}}
  |  ({{
      #if: {{{serieseditor|}}} | {{{serieseditor|}}}. 
    }}{{{series}}}{{
      #if: {{{seriesvolumephrase|{{{seriesvolume|}}}}}}
      | <nowiki/>; {{{seriesvolumephrase|vol. {{{seriesvolume}}}}}}
    }}).
}}{{
  #if: {{{language|}}} |  {{{language}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{doi|}}}
  |  {{
      #if: {{{doi-broken-date|}}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}} (inactive {{{doi-broken-date}}}) {{
	  #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}}
	  | 	}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}}
    }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{id|}}} |  {{{id}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{isbn|}}} |  {{ISBN|{{{isbn}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{oclc|}}} |  {{OCLC|{{{oclc}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}"
}}{{
  #if: {{{lay-summary|}}}
  |  [{{{lay-summary}}} Lay summary]{{
      #if: {{{lay-source|}}} | <nowiki/>: ''<nowiki/>{{{lay-source}}}<nowiki/>''
     }}{{#if: {{{lay-date|}}} | , {{{lay-date}}} }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{notes|}}} |  {{{notes}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterid|}}} |  {{{chapterid}}},
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  || {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
       |  {{
	   #if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	   | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
		{{{chapter|}}} {{
		  #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
		}}
	      }}]
	   | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	     }}
	 }}{{
	   #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	   |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	   | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	 }}
     }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}}{{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{chapterupdate|}}}{{
      #if: {{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
      | {{
	  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}} | <nowiki/>; 
	}}Retrieved {{{chapteraccessdate}}}
    }}].
}}{{
  #if: {{{at|{{{page|{{{pages|}}}}}}}}}
  |  {{{at|p. {{{page|{{{pages}}}}}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterlanguage|}}} |  {{{chapterlanguage}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Vcite journal/doc}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Pages with DOIs broken vcite]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<templatestyles src="Citation/styles.css"/><cite class="citation book csvan"{{
  #if: {{{ref|{{{harvid|}}}}}}
  | <nowiki/> id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref|CITEREF{{{harvid}}}}}}}}"
}}>{{
  #if: {{{author|}}} | {{{author}}}{{{author.|.}}} 
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	  | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
	       {{{chapter|}}} {{
		 #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	       }}
	     }}]
	  | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	    }}
	}}{{
	  #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	  |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	  | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	}} 
    }}In: {{#ifeq: {{{editor}}} | - || {{{editor}}}.  }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{trans_title|}}}
  | ''{{
      #if: {{{url|}}}
      | [{{{url}}} {{#if:||
	   {{{title|}}} {{
	     #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	   }}
	 }}]
      | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | <nowiki/>{{{title}}}<nowiki/> }} {{
	  #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	}}
    }}''
}}{{
  #if: {{{contenttype|}}}{{{format|}}}
  |  [{{{contenttype|}}}{{
      #if: {{{contenttype|}}} | {{#if: {{{format|}}} |  on  }}
    }}{{{format|}}}].
  | {{#if: {{{trans_title|}}}
      | .
      | {{#if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}} | {{{title.|.}}} }}
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{editionphrase|{{{edition|}}}}}}
  |  {{{editionphrase|{{{edition}}} ed}}}{{{editionphrase.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{secondaryauthor|}}} |  {{{secondaryauthor}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumephrase|{{{volume|}}}}}}
  |  {{{volumephrase|Vol. {{{volume}}}}}}{{
      #if: {{{volumetitle|}}}{{{volumepagination|}}} | , | .
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumetitle|}}} |  {{{volumetitle}}}{{{volumetitle.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumepagination|}}} |  {{{volumepagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{location|}}} |  {{{location}}}:
}}{{
  #if: {{{publisher|}}} |  {{{publisher}}};
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}} |  {{{date|{{{year}}}}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{update|}}}{{
      #if: {{{accessdate|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{update|}}} | <nowiki/>;  }}Retrieved {{{accessdate}}}
    }}]
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}}{{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}} | .
}}{{
  #if: {{{pagination|}}} |  {{{pagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{physicaldescription|}}} |  {{{physicaldescription}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{series|}}}
  |  ({{
      #if: {{{serieseditor|}}} | {{{serieseditor|}}}. 
    }}{{{series}}}{{
      #if: {{{seriesvolumephrase|{{{seriesvolume|}}}}}}
      | <nowiki/>; {{{seriesvolumephrase|vol. {{{seriesvolume}}}}}}
    }}).
}}{{
  #if: {{{language|}}} |  {{{language}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{doi|}}}
  |  {{
      #if: {{{doi-broken-date|}}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}} (inactive {{{doi-broken-date}}}) {{
	  #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}}
	  | 	}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}}
    }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{id|}}} |  {{{id}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{isbn|}}} |  {{ISBN|{{{isbn}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{oclc|}}} |  {{OCLC|{{{oclc}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}"
}}{{
  #if: {{{lay-summary|}}}
  |  [{{{lay-summary}}} Lay summary]{{
      #if: {{{lay-source|}}} | <nowiki/>: ''<nowiki/>{{{lay-source}}}<nowiki/>''
     }}{{#if: {{{lay-date|}}} | , {{{lay-date}}} }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{notes|}}} |  {{{notes}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterid|}}} |  {{{chapterid}}},
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  || {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
       |  {{
	   #if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	   | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
		{{{chapter|}}} {{
		  #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
		}}
	      }}]
	   | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	     }}
	 }}{{
	   #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	   |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	   | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	 }}
     }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}}{{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{chapterupdate|}}}{{
      #if: {{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
      | {{
	  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}} | <nowiki/>; 
	}}Retrieved {{{chapteraccessdate}}}
    }}].
}}{{
  #if: {{{at|{{{page|{{{pages|}}}}}}}}}
  |  {{{at|p. {{{page|{{{pages}}}}}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterlanguage|}}} |  {{{chapterlanguage}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Vcite journal/doc}}

[[Category:Pages with DOIs broken vcite]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Pages with DOIs broken vcite]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24593703458|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<templatestyles src="Citation/styles.css"/><cite class="citation book csvan"{{
  #if: {{{ref|{{{harvid|}}}}}}
  | <nowiki/> id="{{anchorencode:{{{ref|CITEREF{{{harvid}}}}}}}}"
}}>{{
  #if: {{{author|}}} | {{{author}}}{{{author.|.}}} 
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	  | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
	       {{{chapter|}}} {{
		 #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	       }}
	     }}]
	  | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	    }}
	}}{{
	  #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	  |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	  | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	}} 
    }}In: {{#ifeq: {{{editor}}} | - || {{{editor}}}.  }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}}{{{trans_title|}}}
  | ''{{
      #if: {{{url|}}}
      | [{{{url}}} {{#if:||
	   {{{title|}}} {{
	     #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	   }}
	 }}]
      | {{#if: {{{title|}}} | <nowiki/>{{{title}}}<nowiki/> }} {{
	  #if: {{{trans_title|}}} | [{{{trans_title}}}]
	}}
    }}''
}}{{
  #if: {{{contenttype|}}}{{{format|}}}
  |  [{{{contenttype|}}}{{
      #if: {{{contenttype|}}} | {{#if: {{{format|}}} |  on  }}
    }}{{{format|}}}].
  | {{#if: {{{trans_title|}}}
      | .
      | {{#if: {{{url|}}}{{{title|}}} | {{{title.|.}}} }}
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{editionphrase|{{{edition|}}}}}}
  |  {{{editionphrase|{{{edition}}} ed}}}{{{editionphrase.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{secondaryauthor|}}} |  {{{secondaryauthor}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumephrase|{{{volume|}}}}}}
  |  {{{volumephrase|Vol. {{{volume}}}}}}{{
      #if: {{{volumetitle|}}}{{{volumepagination|}}} | , | .
    }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumetitle|}}} |  {{{volumetitle}}}{{{volumetitle.|.}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{volumepagination|}}} |  {{{volumepagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{location|}}} |  {{{location}}}:
}}{{
  #if: {{{publisher|}}} |  {{{publisher}}};
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}} |  {{{date|{{{year}}}}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{update|}}}{{
      #if: {{{accessdate|}}}
      | {{#if: {{{update|}}} | <nowiki/>;  }}Retrieved {{{accessdate}}}
    }}]
}}{{
  #if: {{{date|{{{year|}}}}}}{{{update|}}}{{{accessdate|}}} | .
}}{{
  #if: {{{pagination|}}} |  {{{pagination}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{physicaldescription|}}} |  {{{physicaldescription}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{series|}}}
  |  ({{
      #if: {{{serieseditor|}}} | {{{serieseditor|}}}. 
    }}{{{series}}}{{
      #if: {{{seriesvolumephrase|{{{seriesvolume|}}}}}}
      | <nowiki/>; {{{seriesvolumephrase|vol. {{{seriesvolume}}}}}}
    }}).
}}{{
  #if: {{{language|}}} |  {{{language}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{doi|}}}
  |  {{
      #if: {{{doi-broken-date|}}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}} (inactive {{{doi-broken-date}}}) {{
	  #ifeq: {{NAMESPACE}} | {{ns:0}}
	  | 	}}
      | {{doi|{{{doi}}}}}
    }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{id|}}} |  {{{id}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{isbn|}}} |  {{ISBN|{{{isbn}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{oclc|}}} |  {{OCLC|{{{oclc}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{quote|}}} |  "{{{quote}}}"
}}{{
  #if: {{{lay-summary|}}}
  |  [{{{lay-summary}}} Lay summary]{{
      #if: {{{lay-source|}}} | <nowiki/>: ''<nowiki/>{{{lay-source}}}<nowiki/>''
     }}{{#if: {{{lay-date|}}} | , {{{lay-date}}} }}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{notes|}}} |  {{{notes}}}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterid|}}} |  {{{chapterid}}},
}}{{
  #if: {{{editor|}}}
  || {{#if: {{{chapter-url|}}}{{{chapter|}}}{{{trans_chapter|}}}
       |  {{
	   #if: {{{chapter-url|}}}
	   | [{{{chapter-url}}} {{#if:||
		{{{chapter|}}} {{
		  #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
		}}
	      }}]
	   | {{{chapter|}}} {{
	       #if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | [{{{trans_chapter}}}]
	     }}
	 }}{{
	   #if: {{{chapterformat|}}}
	   |  [{{{chapterformat}}}].
	   | {{#if: {{{trans_chapter|}}} | . | {{{chapter.|.}}} }}
	 }}
     }}
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}}{{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
  |  [{{{chapterupdate|}}}{{
      #if: {{{chapteraccessdate|}}}
      | {{
	  #if: {{{chapterupdate|}}} | <nowiki/>; 
	}}Retrieved {{{chapteraccessdate}}}
    }}].
}}{{
  #if: {{{at|{{{page|{{{pages|}}}}}}}}}
  |  {{{at|p. {{{page|{{{pages}}}}}}}}}.
}}{{
  #if: {{{chapterlanguage|}}} |  {{{chapterlanguage}}}.
}}</cite><noinclude>
{{documentation|Template:Vcite journal/doc}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
